features.name: RapidAPIClient — fetch per-profile posts via tiktok-scraper7 and instagram-looter2
features.description: Async httpx client. TikTok: GET https://tiktok-scraper7.p.rapidapi.com/user/posts?unique_id={handle}&count=30 with X-RapidAPI-Key header. Instagram: GET https://instagram-looter2.p.rapidapi.com/v1/posts?username_or_id_or_url={handle}. Twitter: GET http://localhost:3007/api/search?author={handle}&limit=20. Returns list of raw post dicts per platform

features.name: PostNormalizer — normalize raw API responses to PostData dataclass
features.description: Map each platform's raw post dict to PostData(post_id, platform, text, likes, comments, shares, saves, views, posted_at, url). TikTok path: data.videos[]. Instagram path: data.items[]. Twitter path: data[]. Handle missing fields with None defaults

features.name: EngagementScorer — score each post using platform-weighted formula
features.description: WEIGHTS per platform: twitter {likes:1, retweets:2, bookmarks:2, quotes:3}, instagram {likes:1, comments:2, shares:3, saves:3}, tiktok {likes:1, comments:2, shares:3, saves:2}. engagement_score = sum(metric * weight). Return scored PostData list sorted desc

features.name: crm_contact_posts Supabase upsert — store top 3 posts per contact
features.description: For top 3 scored posts: UPSERT to crm_contact_posts(contact_id, platform, post_id, post_text, likes, comments, shares, saves, views, engagement_score, posted_at, fetched_at). ON CONFLICT(contact_id, platform, post_id) DO UPDATE. Apply migration for table

features.name: crm_market_research upsert — sync top post into existing market research record
features.description: After storing crm_contact_posts: UPDATE crm_market_research SET top_post_text=top1.text, top_post_likes=top1.likes, top_post_url=top1.url, enriched_at=NOW() WHERE contact_id=X. INSERT if no existing record. Ensures AAG-051 ContextBuilder always finds fresh data

features.name: EnrichmentGate — only enrich contacts not yet enriched or stale (>7 days)
features.description: SELECT contacts WHERE pipeline_stage IN ('new','scored','ready_for_dm') AND (post_enriched_at IS NULL OR post_enriched_at < NOW()-7days) ORDER BY icp_score DESC LIMIT 100. Returns ContactBatch. Add post_enriched_at column to crm_contacts via migration

features.name: ContactPostEnricher.run() — main enrichment loop
features.description: Main entry: get EnrichmentGate batch → for each contact: fetch posts via RapidAPIClient → normalize → score → store top 3 → sync crm_market_research → UPDATE crm_contacts.post_enriched_at=NOW(). Return EnrichmentResult with counts

features.name: Fallback to Market Research API if RapidAPI fails
features.description: If RapidAPI returns non-200 or empty list: fall back to POST http://localhost:3106/api/research/{platform}/search with {keyword: handle, maxResults: 10}. Filter results by author match. Log fallback used. Do not fail the whole contact enrichment on one platform error

features.name: CLI — python3 acquisition/contact_post_enricher.py --run
features.description: CLI flags: --contact-id (single contact), --platform, --dry-run, --limit N, --force (ignore staleness gate). Print enrichment summary with contact handles and top post scores. Matches AAG harness pattern

features.name: Cron registration — post_enrichment nightly at 2AM
features.description: Register cron_definitions.py entry: post_enrichment (daily 2AM). Triggers ContactPostEnricher.run() with limit=200. Gate behind ENABLE_POST_ENRICHMENT config flag. Process highest ICP score contacts first

features.name: POST /api/acquisition/enrich/posts endpoint
features.description: HTTP endpoint: accept contact_id or batch of contact_ids, trigger enrichment, return EnrichmentResult. Supports dry_run flag. Used by dashboard and manual triggers

features.name: crm_contact_posts Supabase table migration
features.description: CREATE TABLE crm_contact_posts: id uuid PK, contact_id uuid FK crm_contacts, platform text, post_id text, post_text text, likes int, comments int, shares int, saves int, views int, engagement_score float, posted_at timestamptz, fetched_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(). UNIQUE(contact_id, platform, post_id)

features.name: Tests — unit tests for RapidAPI client, normalizer, scorer, gate
features.description: pytest: test_tiktok_rapidapi_response_normalization, test_instagram_rapidapi_response_normalization, test_engagement_scorer_ordering, test_enrichment_gate_staleness_check, test_crm_market_research_sync. Mock httpx responses with fixture data

features.name: RAPIDAPI_KEY env var — add to config.py and .env.example
features.description: Add RAPIDAPI_KEY to config.py with os.getenv('RAPIDAPI_KEY'). Add ENABLE_RAPIDAPI=true flag. Add to .env.example with comment referencing WhatsCurrentlyInTheMarket repo. Fail gracefully (fall back to Market Research API) if key missing
